commit.subject: LU-17327 tests: conf-sanity/46c to avoid MDT balance
commit.message:
LU-17327 tests: conf-sanity/46c to avoid MDT balance

Check if freezing the filesystem avoids newly-added OSTs and MDTs
from being used for new file/dir creation while being added to the
filesystem.
